description: You are a Platform Engineer maintaining an internal feature flag rule engine in the `feature_flags` library located at `/home/ga/PycharmProjects/feature_flags`. Resolve the following critical bugs identified in the engine: syntax errors when parsing floating point numbers, incorrect operator precedence where AND/OR logic evaluates in the wrong order (AND should bind tighter than OR), and crashes caused by the lack of short-circuit evaluation for logical operators. You must fix the Lexer, Parser, and Evaluator components so that all tests in `tests/test_engine.py` pass. Do not modify the test files.
